message:
feat: add i128 support for large integers and comptime branch elimination

Integer handling:
- sys.maxsize now emits i128 to allow sys.maxsize + 1 without overflow
- int(string) parses to i128 to handle large integers
- int(float) detects BigInt requirements and emits clear compile-time error
- Variable declarations skip type annotation for integers (let Zig infer)

Comptime branch elimination:
- Added isComptimeConstantCondition() to detect compile-time constant conditions
- Detects literal True/False, isinstance() calls, and negated expressions
- genIf() now only emits the taken branch, eliminating dead code

Results for test_int.py: Reduced from 8+ errors to 1 (BigInt limitation)
